title: correction_candidate
description: A proposed correction to the extraction prompt. schema_version 1.0.0 is the original Phase T low-confidence-gate origin; 1.1.0 (Phase Y) adds the optional candidate_source field so a miner- or revert-origin candidate is distinguishable from the gate origin. candidate_source defaults to 'low_confidence_gate' for artifacts written before Phase Y (the field is optional and the legacy low_confidence_* fields are still required for that origin), so old artifacts remain valid unchanged.

review_status.description: Phase X2.6: lifecycle marker. submit_review.py updates this to 'reviewed' (or 'reviewed_after_expiry' when the candidate was past expires_at when reviewed). Default 'pending'.

review_artifact_id.description: Phase X2.6: human_review_artifact_id of the most recent review on this candidate. Null until reviewed.

candidate_source.description: Phase Y.5: origin of the candidate. Absent => 'low_confidence_gate' (backward compatible). 'miner' => mined from a false_negative_set cluster. 'revert' => proposes reverting a prior prompt_addition_id.

target_transcript_id.description: Phase Y.5: transcript the miner cluster was derived from.

schema_type.description: Phase Y.5: the schema_type of the false-negative cluster.

pattern_signature.description: Phase Y.5: sha256 of the canonical cluster signature (speaker_role, preceding_marker, length_bucket).

cluster_size.description: Phase Y.5: number of false negatives in the cluster.

false_negative_set_artifact_id.description: Phase Y.5: the false_negative_set this candidate was mined from.

proposed_prompt_addition.description: Phase Y.5: the additive prompt fragment Opus proposed (<= 100 words).

revert_of_prompt_addition_id.description: Phase Y.7: for candidate_source=='revert', the prompt_addition_id this candidate proposes reverting.
